title: Eight Hundred Meters
author: flowerlandd07
tags: Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings, Hyuuga Neji/Tenten, Hyuuga Neji, Tenten (Naruto), Hyuuga Neji Lives, Mentioned Tenten (Naruto), Post-War
summary: He tells himself it’s just another mission. Until one day, she disappears from his sight. Or Neji learns that even the Byakugan has its limits and so does he.

title: The shape of quiet things
author: Xasevich
tags: Graphic Depictions Of Violence, Temari/Uchiha Itachi, Temari (Naruto), Uchiha Itachi, Uzumaki Naruto, Tsunade (Naruto), Uchiha Sasuke, Uchiha Fugaku, Uchiha Mikoto, Sarutobi Hiruzen, Gaara (Naruto), Rasa (Naruto), Kankurou (Naruto), Hatake Kakashi, Shimura Danzou, Slow Burn, Political Alliances, Arranged Marriage, Post-Traumatic Stress Disorder - PTSD, Temari Needs a Hug (Naruto), Uchiha Itachi Lives, Alternate Universe - Canon Divergence, Rasa Lives (Naruto), Bad Parent Rasa (Naruto), Eventual Smut
summary: In a world where the Uchiha coup never happened, peace was not achieved — it was enforced. Years ago, Shisui Uchiha entrusted his eyes to Itachi Uchiha, allowing him to stop the clan from rising against Konoha. The truth of that night was buried with Shisui, and the village moved on, unaware of how close it came to collapse. Itachi Uchiha has been Head of ANBU for seven years. He is very good at it. He is becoming less certain that it is. When Tsunade assigns him to negotiate a Sand–Leaf alliance, Itachi is forced to do something he has avoided for years: step out of the shadows and trust someone he cannot control. Temari of Suna understands exactly what it means to play a role and recognizes it in him. Outside the walls, Akatsuki is moving. Inside them, old wounds haven’t fully closed. And somewhere between duty and something he doesn’t yet have a name for, Itachi is quietly running out of reasons to keep his distance from his own life.

title: transfer pending
author: Pizza90901
tags: Graphic Depictions Of Violence, Karin/Uchiha Sasuke, Haruno Sakura/Uzumaki Naruto, Uchiha Sasuke, Haruno Sakura, Karin (Naruto), Uzumaki Naruto, Hatake Kakashi, Yakushi Kabuto, Hyuuga Hinata, Nara Shikamaru, Hyuuga Neji, Rock Lee, Tenten (Naruto), Alternate Universe, Early 2000, Naruto Shippuden, Forced Proximity, Slice of Life, Tropes, Uchiha Sasuke-centric, Karin and Uzumaki Naruto are Cousins, Fluff and Angst
summary: Mid-strike, Naruto and Sasuke are pulled out of their world and dropped into a university. This world already has a Naruto and a Sasuke, and to avoid being exposed they have to step into lives that aren't theirs, classes, relationships, friends, routines, small social rules they don't understand, without getting caught. If they ever hope to get back, they need to work together and follow Kabuto, the only one who's already learned how to pass.

title: What Comes After the End
author: Fina77
tags: Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings, Haruno Sakura, Uchiha Sasuke, Uzumaki Naruto, Haruno Mebuki, Haruno Kizashi, Uchiha Mikoto, Uchiha Fugaku, Jiraiya (Naruto), Uchiha Inabi, Trauma, Psychological Trauma, Second Chances, Healing, Found Family, Slow Burn, Time Travel, Dai-nana-han | Team 7 (Naruto), Drama, Friendship, Eventual Romance, Alternate Universe - Modern Setting
summary: If you were given the chance to go back and change the past, would you consider it a blessing or a curse? Additional tags and characters will be added as the story progresses.

title: Blast to the past
author: OErrawrO
tags: No Archive Warnings Apply, Hatake Kakashi & Namikaze Minato, Hatake Kakashi & Sarutobi Asuma, Hatake Kakashi & Nohara Rin & Uchiha Obito, Namikaze Minato/Uzumaki Kushina, Hatake Kakashi, Namikaze Minato, Uzumaki Kushina, Uchiha Obito, Nohara Rin, Shiranui Genma, Sarutobi Asuma, Yuuhi Kurenai, Time Travel Fix-It, Time Travel, Fluff, Hurt/Comfort, Smart Hatake Kakashi, BAMF Hatake Kakashi, Friendship, Parental Namikaze Minato, Platonic Relationships
summary: Kakashi never expected that a quick visit to his old, ruined compound might destroy the peace that the shinobi world has finally achieved. Suddenly back in the past Kakashi has to make a difficult decision. Can he risk changing what will happen, knowing his actions could endanger the whole of Konoha? Can he risk going against the mantra, deeply ingrained now even after the 4th war, and sit by as his comrades die?  OR: Kakashi gets a blast to the past, deeply traumatized with the abilities of emotional regulation befitting of a seven year old child! (its mainly gonna be bamf Kakashi gathering a small army of people that would gut a stranger for him :))

title: Hope Did Not Die Here
author: Flux_Uchiha
tags: No Archive Warnings Apply, Tenten & Uchiha Shisui, Namikaze Minato/Uzumaki Kushina, Namikaze Minato & Uchiha Shisui, Uchiha Shisui & Uzumaki Kushina, Tenten (Naruto), Uchiha Shisui, Namikaze Minato, Uzumaki Kushina, Shiranui Genma, Tatami Iwashi, Tenten-centric (Naruto), POV Tenten (Naruto), BAMF Tenten (Naruto), Tenten Needs a Hug (Naruto), Uchiha Shisui-centric, Uchiha Shisui Needs a Hug, POV Uchiha Shisui, Hokage Namikaze Minato, Angst and Hurt/Comfort, Angst with a Happy Ending, Trauma Recovery, Physical Disability, Shisui is missing an eye and an arm, and Tenten has a spinal injury, Alternate Universe - Space, Alternate Universe - Science Fiction, Alternate Universe - Telepathy, Tenten is a natural shielder, Slice of Life, figuring out how to live again, Fluff, Paranoia, Implied/Referenced Sexual Assault, it'll only be mentioned briefly, but tagging is important, Implied/Referenced Character Death, no one named/major, but still
summary: Forcibly retired from the Pioneer Corps after an injury leaves her with limited mobility, Tenten is left reeling in a world that does not promise her early death, and a world that isn't anywhere close to the future she had always thought she'd had. After the ascension of Namikaze Minato to the throne of the Konohagakure Empire and the execution of the traitors Hiruzen, Danzo, and Tori, Shisui no longer has to be on the run for his life. However, he's not sure he remembers how to do anything but run. After a suggestion from his wife, Namikaze Minato decides to try killing two birds with one stone. Shisui and Tenten don't have anywhere to stay, and their respective disabilities would make it hard to live alone. Why not see if they’d be able to help each other out?

title: Wings of Humanity
author: eloriah (EliasCe)
tags: Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings, Graphic Depictions Of Violence, Major Character Death, Hatake Kakashi & Nohara Rin & Uchiha Obito, Hatake Kakashi & Original Character(s), Hatake Kakashi & Uchiha Obito, Hatake Kakashi & Hatake Sakumo, Hatake Kakashi & Sho Makkuro, Hatake Kakashi, Original Characters, Sho Makkuro, Uchiha Obito, Nohara Rin, Hatake Sakumo, Arisawa Zumi, Canon-Typical Violence, Blood and Violence, Angst and Hurt/Comfort, Major Character Injury, Canonical Character Death, Alternate Universe - Canon Divergence, Angel & Human Interactions, Angel!Kakashi, My First Fanfic, English Is Not The Author's First Language, angel - Freeform, This fanfic is not religion-related, Angels and Demons in this story are simply creatures with their own functions and purposes like we're humans, Half-breed Angel Kakashi
summary: We are living and dying at the same time. Love reminds us of dying. Hate, otherwise. “Look at its right eye, the human eye. That creepy creature must be a half-breed. Damn it.” Sounds of clattering echoed in his quivering mind. Pieces of shattered glass were rattling on the floor, or his broken heart and soul were crashing into his blood. He didn’t know…didn't want to know anymore…When will I stop living? When will this insufferable life end? Our life will flash before our eyes when we are close to death.

title: The Things Left Unsaid
author: HiddenInRain
tags: No Archive Warnings Apply, Hatake Kakashi/Original Female Character(s), Original Female Character(s), Hatake Kakashi, Pregnancy, Angst with a Happy Ending, Emotional Hurt/Comfort, Miscommunication, Established Relationship
summary: Shiori found out she was pregnant on a quiet Thursday afternoon. Two days later, she was gone. And Kakashi would replay those forty-eight hours in his head for months afterward, memorizing every expression, every pause, every sentence he wished he could take back.

Only problem is that she was too successful in doing so and now has Tsunade's undivided attention focused solely on her.

title: The Many Orphans of Konoha
author: SnowBro12
tags: Graphic Depictions Of Violence, Major Character Death, Hyuuga Neji/Tenten, Hyuuga Hinata/Uzumaki Naruto, Haruno Sakura/Uchiha Sasuke, Hatake Kakashi/Mitarashi Anko, Hyuuga Neji, Uzumaki Naruto, Uchiha Sasuke, Tenten (Naruto), Hatake Kakashi, Yamanaka Ino, Rock Lee, Mitarashi Anko, Family Drama, Angst, Hurt/Comfort, Child Soldiers, Alternate Team Assignments, Mikoto Uchiha Adopts Naruto, Naruto and Sasuke are brothers, Psychological Trauma, Slow Burn, Team as Family
summary: What if Naruto trained alongside Neji and Tenten rather than Sasuke and Sakura? What if Sasuke had to settle for Kurenai as his sensei? This is the story of Konoha and all of the orphans it harbors. It's not the story of any one person, it's the story of a village and a bunch of unwell kids. It's not always a happy story, but it's not a always sad story either. Even in the darkness there is kindness and love.

title: Before Nightfall
author: Shil_ancz_oh
tags: Graphic Depictions Of Violence, Deidara/Sasori/Original Female Character(s), Uchiha Sasuke/Original Female Character(s), Uchiha Itachi/Original Female Character(s), Sasori (Naruto), Uzumaki Naruto, Akatsuki (Naruto) - Character, Orochimaru (Naruto), Yakushi Kabuto, Uchiha Itachi, Uchiha Sasuke, Original Ootsutsuki Character(s), Original Female Character(s), Hatake Kakashi, Drama & Romance, Inspired by Music, Romance, Angst and Romance, Coming of Age, Alternate Universe - Canon Divergence, Musical References, Light Angst, Fluff and Smut, Mild Smut, Angst and Fluff and Smut, Non-Graphic Smut, Dark Character, Psychological Trauma, Alternate Universe - Fantasy, Dark Fantasy, Action/Adventure, Fights, Trippy, Psychotropic Drugs, Alternate Universe - Psychedelic Dreams, References to Drugs, Original Character(s), Fantasizing, Canon-Typical Violence, Sexual Violence, Unresolved Emotional Tension
summary: Izumi's Trilogy, Book Two.(Originally posted in 2023, updated in 2026) The Nanusake sisters eventually reunite after years of being forced to follow dark paths to save themselves, in the ranks of Akatsuki and under Orochimaru's protection. Yet there seems to be hardly any peace for Akira and Izumi, just like Sasuke and Itachi, whose dark fate has already been sealed during the Uchiha massacre.The madness that follows the great power Izumi gains from the Moth becomes uncontrollable, while she struggles to remember her old friends and home... The memories Sasori tries to wipe out with his sweet games. Part II takes place during pre-Shippuden Naruto, slightly canon-divergent (not changing the main storyline).

title: The Surrogate III
author: EntertainmentExperiments
tags: Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings, Hatake Kakashi/Original Female Character(s), ANBU Kakashi - Character, Jiraiya (Naruto), Toad Summons - Character, Original Characters, Ghost Sakumo, Namikaze Minato, Tsunade (Naruto), Adventure, Mpreg, Experiments with Drama, Humour, Smut and Action, Course Language, Violence fitting in with anime ninja themes
summary: The Surrogate Second Trimester continues three days on from The Surrogate II and follows Kakashi's cover S rank mission with Legendary Sannin Jiraiya during the second trimester of his surrogate pregnancy for Minato and Kushina.Along the way Jiraiya takes Kakashi on a journey with the intent to teach the young and serious ANBU how to have fun by introducing him to the world of Icha Icha. Kakashi uses his Hatake Talent that he developed while living with Orochimaru to help him try to solve the mystery of Obito, Pa Toad Summons teases Kakashi before agreeing to train him, disaster strikes for Jiraiya in Iwa and he nearly misses an important deadline permanently.

title: For As Long As You Stay

summary: They were just teammates. Until war, loss, and one night blurred the line between duty and desire. Now, something fragile is growing between them: unspoken, dangerous, and deeply entangled in the Hyuuga clan's darkest truths. As whispers spread and choices close in, Neji must face the question: How would he protect someone from a legacy that was never meant to spare them?

title: Suzu no Ne
author: NewAgedHippie
tags: Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings, Hatake Kakashi/Original Female Character(s), Hyuuga Hinata/Uzumaki Naruto, Uzumaki Naruto & Original Female Character(s), Uzumaki Naruto, Mitarashi Anko, Yamato | Tenzou, Haruno Sakura, Hatake Kakashi, Sarutobi Hiruzen, Romance
summary: Hiruzen knew what he was doing, and he hoped his meddling would be beneficial in the end. She was practically his Granddaughter, and Kakashi Hatake, well he needed this. Even if he'd never admit it. So Hiruzen assigned Naruto onto Kakashi's team, knowing the two would meet again, for the first time. The resulting chaos of emotions went off like fireworks, and he sat back and watched.

title: NOT LIKE THE MOVIES
author: felix14
tags: Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings, Haruno Sakura/Uchiha Sasuke, Haruno Sakura & Uchiha Sasuke, Sai/Yamanaka Ino, Hyuuga Hinata/Uzumaki Naruto, Haruno Sakura, Uchiha Sasuke, Uzumaki Naruto, Hatake Kakashi, Sai (Naruto), Yamanaka Ino, Hyuuga Hinata, Uchiha Itachi, Uchiha Izumi, Uchiha Mikoto, Uchiha Fugaku, Karin (Naruto), Hoozuki Suigetsu, Romance, Drama & Romance, Slow Romance, Slow Burn, Angst and Drama, Family Drama, Fluff, Show Business, Alternate Universe - High School, Alternate Universe - College/University, Alternate Universe - Modern Setting, Romantic Comedy, Romantic Fluff, Comedy, Satire, Dark Comedy, Haruno Sakura-centric, POV Haruno Sakura, Protective Uchiha Sasuke, High School, Work
summary: --- A love story caught between real life and the romance of the silver screen --- Not Like The Movies tells the story of Haruno Sakura, a celebrated novelist who is trying her hand at a new profession as a screenwriter. She is working on a film inspired by her true love, Uchiha Sasuke-her high school friend who is now her partner. Having lost both of his parents, Sasuke is still carrying deep grief and is far from the kind of man found in conventional romantic films, while Sakura insists on expressing her love the way it is portrayed in movies. The conflict begins when Sakura hides the truth from Sasuke-that his life and pain are being turned into a film. When the truth comes out, will Sasuke be moved by her devotion, or will he walk out of Sakura's life once again, this time forever?

Or Just read the damn summery (Authors note: 1)(Chapters: 2/??)

title: Praise the Log
author: PanzyBears
tags: Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings, Tsunade (Naruto) & Original Character(s), Uzuki Yuugao & Original Character(s), Dai-nana-han | Team 7 Ensemble (Naruto) & Original Character(s), Mitarashi Anko & Original Character(s), Tsunade (Naruto), Uzumaki Naruto, Hatake Kakashi, Uzuki Yuugao, Ami (Naruto), Original Characters, Dai-nana-han | Team 7 Ensemble (Naruto), Rookie 9 Ensemble (Naruto), Rei (OC), Mitarashi Anko, Self-Insert, Reincarnation, Alternate Universe - Canon Divergence, Family, Angst, Post-Traumatic Stress Disorder - PTSD, How to bullshit your way through an anime, He's not a nara, he wishes, Cryptid SI, Swords, Healing, Masks, Death, It's Not Paranoia If They're Really Out To Get You, Mokuton | Wood Release, Crack, Crack Treated Seriously, wonky timeline, Bad Luck runs in the family apparently, The intense search for hobbies, The Author Regrets Nothing, Age Regression/De-Aging, SIOC is tired, give him a break, OC doesn't know what's going on, Loneliness, Training, give him a montage already, BAMF Tsunade (Naruto), Hokage Tsunade (Naruto), Protective Tsunade (Naruto), SI is casually terrifying, Genin Corps (Naruto), Ami gets a shot at redemption, Cult-like behavior, Praise the Log, The Log Provides, Burn the itchy blanket already, Eventual Fluff, Touch-Starved
summary: He’s twenty-six and he’s bleeding out on the ground and he’s so, so cold. But, he’s also twelve and he’s still alive. Still breathing steadily. There’s no blood leaking out of him. And he’s warm, body relaxed under the comforting weight of his blanket. He sighs, world-weary and exhausted. Of course it didn’t stick. Only he would manage to screw up death. Again. ................. Waking up in a different universe is supposed to be a sweet deal. Too bad nobody gave him the message. In a world of tailed-beasts and magical eye bullshit, Rei thinks getting strong without them is impossible. But he has to try. If only so he can mess with people and stay alive long enough to continue doing it.

title: Naruto: Orochimaru's Disciple
author: FanficLord03
tags: Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings, Ninja, Canon - Anime, Science, Human Experimentation, Orochimaru - Freeform, Action, Adventure, Reincarnation, Transmigration, Dark Character, Evil
summary: Thanks for the invitation. I am currently in Konoha and have just become Orochimaru's apprentice. "So, is the Sharingan's transformation from one tomoe to two or three tomoe due to genetic mutation, or something else?" Staring at the restrained Uchiha test subject in front of him, Kenichi Amamiya's eyes shine with intense curiosity. Orochimaru silently accepts the thick stack of pages in his hand, titled “Research Report on the Impact of Soul Reincarnation on the Body.” When Orochimaru receives a paper titled “Research Report on the Impact of Soul Reincarnation on the Body” from his disciple, only one thought crosses his mind: This kid is even more dangerous than I am

title: Naruto: Teaching Makes Me Stronger
author: FanficLord03
tags: Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings, Reincarnation, Transmigration, naruto - Freeform, Fanfic, Fan-fic, Fan-fiction, Action, Uchiha, tsunade - Freeform, shisui - Freeform, obito - Freeform, minato - Freeform, kushina - Freeform, Ninja
summary: Mugetsu transmigrates into the world of Naruto as an ordinary Chūnin instructor in Konoha—while secretly serving under Danzō’s Root Organization. Knowing that weakness means death, he resolves to change his fate. When the Teacher System awakens, Mugetsu gains power through his students’ growth. [First A-Rated Teaching Evaluation Complete — Reward: Mastery in Fire Release Chakra Nature Transformation.][Student Shisui gained +30 Chakra. You gained +60 Chakra.] From mentoring Shisui, Kakashi, Obito, Guy, and Rin, to researching Sealing Techniques and Breathing Styles, Mugetsu quietly shapes Konoha’s future geniuses while growing into a legend himself. But as the Third Great Ninja War approaches and Root’s shadow closes in, Mugetsu must decide—will he remain a pawn of Danzō, or rise as the teacher who forges the next generation of heroes?
